chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. S- 127 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 380/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 19.05.2025. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, AAG. ******* Learned counsel for petitioner submits that petitioner Mst. Rukiya has expired as such he does not press the petition, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE Irfan/PS
